result:
The fix is applied to the working copy. I can't run the git commands or delete the tracked file per the project's escalation rules. Specifically:

- `git commit`, `git push`, and deleting a tracked file are all classified as consequential (never done unilaterally).
- `src/stages/parse.ts` requires Priya Anand's review before merge.
- `src/io/legacy_cache.ts` requires Tess Whitlock's sign-off plus a security review before deletion (ownership.md is explicit on this).

Approval artifact is at `runtime/queue/approvals/i1-blank-title-fix.md`. Once Priya and Tess sign off, a human can run the three git commands listed there.
